tools.name: ai-wallet-extension
tools.oneLiner: AI Wallet is a Chrome MV3 extension that lets websites request user-approved AI model access without receiving the user's API keys.
tools.description:
AI Wallet is a Chrome MV3 extension that lets websites request user-approved AI model access without receiving the user's API keys.
It works like a wallet for AI API access: the extension stores provider credentials, websites request scoped permission, and approved sessions can stream model output through the extension.
Many AI-powered websites ask users to paste provider API keys directly into th

tools.name: lightnovel-studio
tools.description:
English | 简体中文
一句话概念，AI 帮你写出整部轻小说：世界观 → 角色 → 章节大纲 → 逐章正文。 支持中文与日文，覆盖日式轻小说题材，多 AI 提供商可选，纯前端、数据留本机。
An AI-powered light-novel writing studio. From a one-line concept, it generates the world, cast, chapter outline, and full chapter text — in Chinese or Japanese, with your choice of AI provider. Fully client-side; your data stays in your browser.
- 🎯 一句话生成全稿：输入一句概念，AI 依次生成世界观、角色群、章节大纲，并逐章写出正文
- 🌏 中日双语

tools.name: engineering-os
tools.oneLiner: Your AI finally remembers your codebase.
tools.description:
Your AI finally remembers your codebase.
Stop re-explaining your architecture every session. Engineering OS gives Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, and any MCP-compatible AI code editor the memory they've always been missing. They finally write code like someone who actually knows your project.
npm install -g engineering-os
cd your-project
eos init --claude
That's it. Your AI now has persistent project

tools.name: guard-skills
tools.oneLiner: Focused guard skills for coding agents: second-pass quality gates that catch the systematic failure modes of AI-generated code, tests, and docs before they ship.
tools.description:
Focused guard skills for coding agents: second-pass quality gates that catch the systematic failure modes of AI-generated code, tests, and docs before they ship.
Best use: let your agent do the work, then invoke the relevant guard on the diff before you present, commit, or merge it. These skills can guide writing when you explicitly ask for that, but they are strongest as reactive review passes.
